## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off collaboration between Udemy and GrowthX to enhance Udemy's content strategy, instructor showcasing, and AI-driven capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Udemy aims to shift from course-centric to skills-focused learning experiences, emphasizing AI fluency and upskilling programs](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [GrowthX's AI-powered workflow engine can help create highly curated, personalized content and newsletters to spark curiosity and showcase Udemy's instructors](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Udemy wants to better leverage its instructors' authority and create more touchpoints before purchase to build first-party data](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [The partnership will focus on creating a skills graph, potentially starting with UB (Udemy Business) before expanding to consumer side](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

## Topics

### Udemy's Current Challenges and Goals

  - [Shift focus from individual courses to comprehensive skills development](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Improve discovery and showcase 250,000 course catalog more effectively](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)
  - [Create more touchpoints before purchase to build first-party data](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=2366.0)
  - [Better leverage and showcase instructor authority](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Develop a stronger narrative around skills of the future, especially in AI](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)

### Target Audience and Competitors

  - [B2B: Enterprise customers, focusing on L\&D leaders and tech leaders](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [Consumer: Career starters, pivoters, and advancers (80% of learners)](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Main competitors: ChatGPT and other AI providers, YouTube, LinkedIn Learning, Pluralsight, Skillsoft, Coursera](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=3088.0)
  - [Udemy has 17,000 B2B customers compared to Coursera's 1,000](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=3108.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Solutions

  - [Workflow engine for content generation, fact-checking, and deep research](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Custom knowledge bases and integration with existing data](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Ability to create highly curated newsletters with 41% open rates and 10% click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Generation of comparison pages and vendor catalogs, applicable to skills mapping](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Creation of detailed writing guidelines and expert-in-the-loop content review processes](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

### Potential Areas of Collaboration

  - [Develop a skills graph and leaderboard](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Create a weekly curated newsletter to become the "single point of entry" for skills information](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Enhance Udemy's catalog with AI-enriched descriptions and categorizations](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Showcase instructors more prominently and leverage their authority](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Build confidence with L\&D leaders by creating comprehensive, industry-leading programs](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)

### Udemy's Unique Selling Points

  - [Freshness of content, especially crucial in rapidly evolving fields like AI](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Breadth and depth of course offerings across various roles and skills](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)
  - [Ability to upskill across multiple roles within an organization](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
  - [Strong tech-focused content, particularly in areas like AI and cybersecurity](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to create a Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=4499.0)

  - [Begin calibration process in week 2, presenting initial thoughts and directions](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=4522.0)
  - [Focus on developing the Excel spreadsheet of skills as a priority project](https://fathom.video/share/PjsJghsc6hiBpsokboZHnR9hqye86Vi-?tab=summary&timestamp=4555.0)
